description: Fix TypeScript code examples in plugin guides to match the scaffolded plugin's Prettier config. When developers copy code from plugin-development.mdx and resources-prompts.mdx into their scaffolded plugin, npm run lint and npm run format:check fail with 8-16 formatting errors (double quotes vs single quotes, arrow paren style, line breaking). The first-plugin.mdx examples already pass — these two guides need the same treatment.
qualityChecks: cd docs && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run knip && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Fix plugin-development.mdx code examples to use single quotes and scaffold-compatible formatting
userStories.description: As a plugin developer following the plugin development guide, I want code examples to pass lint and format:check when copied into my scaffolded plugin so that I don't encounter unexpected formatting errors on my first build.
acceptanceCriteria: All TypeScript code blocks in plugin-development.mdx use single quotes instead of double quotes
Arrow function parameters use avoid style (params => not (params) =>)
Zod method chains that fit within 120 chars are on a single line
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
The scaffolded plugin's .prettierrc uses: singleQuote: true, printWidth: 120, trailingComma: 'all', arrowParens: 'avoid'. The doc code examples use double quotes and multi-line formatting that the scaffold's Prettier config would collapse.

File: docs/content/docs/guides/plugin-development.mdx

Key sections to fix (all TypeScript code blocks):
1. 'Define Tools' section (~line 153+): The getItems defineTool example has 16 violations — double quotes on all strings, (params) => instead of params =>, multi-line .number().int().min(1)... chains that fit on one line at printWidth 120.
2. 'Use SDK Utilities' (~line 257+): fetchJSON, retry, waitForSelector, getPageGlobal examples — double quotes.
3. 'Handle Errors' (~line 398+): ToolError.auth() etc examples — double quotes.
4. 'Add Logging' (~line 426+): log.info examples — double quotes.
5. 'Zod Schema Rules' (~line 444+): z.object examples — double quotes.

For each code block, convert all double-quoted strings to single-quoted strings. Change (params) to params in arrow functions. Collapse multi-line Zod chains to single lines where they fit within 120 chars. IMPORTANT: Do not change non-TypeScript code blocks (bash commands, JSON). Do not change prose text. Only modify content inside ```typescript or ```ts fenced code blocks.

userStories.title: Fix resources-prompts.mdx code examples to use single quotes and scaffold-compatible formatting
userStories.description: As a plugin developer following the resources and prompts guide, I want the Full Plugin Example and other code snippets to pass lint and format:check when copied into my scaffolded plugin.
acceptanceCriteria: All TypeScript code blocks in resources-prompts.mdx use single quotes instead of double quotes
Arrow function parameters use avoid style where applicable
Multi-line expressions that fit within 120 chars are collapsed to single lines
as const assertions are preserved (these are correct and necessary)
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
The scaffolded plugin's .prettierrc uses: singleQuote: true, printWidth: 120, trailingComma: 'all', arrowParens: 'avoid'.

File: docs/content/docs/guides/resources-prompts.mdx

Key sections to fix (all TypeScript code blocks):
1. 'Defining a Resource' (~line 25+): channelList example — double quotes on '/api/conversations.list', 'application/json', etc.
2. 'Typed Resources with Schema' (~line 120+): channelList with schema — double quotes, multi-line fetchJSON call.
3. 'Registering Resources' (~line 150+): class example — likely fine (short).
4. 'Defining a Prompt' (~line 183+): summarizeThread — double quotes, (args) should be args.
5. 'Typed Prompts with Zod Schema' (~line 338+): statusReport — double quotes.
6. 'Full Plugin Example' (~line 417+): TrackerPlugin — this is the main offender with 8 formatting violations: multi-line import (lines 10-14 should collapse to one line at 120 width), '/api/items' fetchJSON URL on separate lines (lines 24-26, 46-48), arguments array on multiple lines (42-43), .map chain (52-53), and fetchJSON POST call (82-85).

IMPORTANT: Preserve 'as const' assertions (e.g., role: 'user' as const, type: 'text' as const). These are correct TypeScript and necessary for type narrowing. Only modify content inside ```typescript or ```ts fenced code blocks. Do not change prose or non-code blocks.
